strengths: Proficient with Excel, CRM, Google Workspace
weaknesses: No explicit EMR or medical records experience
improvement_bullets: Utilized digital document management systems to organize and upload sensitive records to databases, similar to EMR/electronic health record protocols, ensuring 100% compliance with confidentiality standards.
Managed high-volume communication channels, including secure fax handling and digital document transmission, to facilitate seamless information flow between departments and external vendors.
Coordinated end-to-end logistics for high-priority projects and vendor services, demonstrating the organizational capacity required for surgical coordination and patient care scheduling.
Demonstrated flexibility in supporting multi-location operations and maintaining a reliable, full-time professional schedule exceeding 40 hours per week.
Leveraged bilingual-adjacent communication skills to provide clear, empathetic support to a diverse range of stakeholders and patients in fast-paced environments.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Administrative Assistant/Receptionist opportunity with Mercer County Works. I am interested in this opportunity because of your reputation as a closely-knit, patient-focused practice where administrative precision directly improves patient outcomes. What interests me about working for Mercer County Works is its patient-first approach to pain management, which resonates with my commitment to providing high-quality, compassionate support in demanding healthcare settings.

I believe my executive-level calendar management and my ability to handle high-volume administrative workflows would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a proactive, solution-oriented mindset. In fact, while at Apex Supply Co., I identified a bottleneck in our document retrieval process and implemented a digital filing system. This resulted in a 50% reduction in retrieval time, a skill I am eager to apply to scanning patient paperwork and managing EMR systems at your practice.

Ultimately, I know that the Administrative Assistant/Receptionist role at Mercer County Works would allow me to bring my high-level organizational skills to patient intake and surgical coordination. Additionally, my role as an Executive Administrative Assistant at Direct Clean Solutions enabled me to develop my multi-tasking and stakeholder coordination skills. I regularly managed 50+ monthly meetings and complex travel logistics for C-suite executives, ensuring that every detail—from visa requirements to briefing materials—was managed with 99% accuracy. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data entry and patient-facing communication to excel in handling confirmation calls and check-in procedures at Mercer County Works. I know that my expertise in administrative operations and my commitment to a 40+ hour work week align with what it takes to succeed in your practice. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,

Millieann Velez
